login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Q‑Agent workspace.
login.rememberMe: Keep me signed in for 30 days
login.provisionedNote: Access is provisioned by your workspace admin.

mfa.title: Two‑factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Enter the 6‑digit code from your authenticator app.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your work email and we’ll send you a secure reset link.
forgot.sendError: Couldn't send reset link. Try again.

sent.title: Check your inbox
sent.bodyPrefix: We sent a reset link to

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your Q‑Agent account.
reset.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.success: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
reset.error: Couldn't reset password. The link may have expired.

signedOut.title: You’re signed out
signedOut.body: Your session on this device has ended. Sign back in whenever you’re ready to pick up where you left off.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

brand.heading: Ship tested, evidenced releases — on autopilot.
brand.description: Q‑Agent reads your tickets, generates Azure DevOps test cases, writes Playwright, runs it in parallel, and publishes evidence back — one continuous pipeline.

points.pipeline: Ticket → tested PR in one pipeline

brand.compliance: SOC 2 Type II · SSO · credentials encrypted at rest

profile.title: Your profile
profile.passwordDesc: Change the password you use to sign in
profile.twofaDisabledDesc: Protect your account with an authenticator app
profile.revokedOthers: Signed out of all other sessions
profile.deleteDesc: Permanently remove your account, runs, and evidence. This cannot be undone.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Enter your current password, then choose a new one (at least 8 characters).

twofaModal.setupSubtitle: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code it generates.
twofaModal.disableSubtitle: Enter the current 6-digit code from your authenticator app to turn off 2FA.
twofaModal.manualHint: Can't scan it? Enter this key manually in your app.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This permanently removes your account, runs, and evidence. This cannot be undone.
